eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Coconino, AZ; at 9:05 PM on JUL 18, 2026 Effective until 1:05 AM JUL 19, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Flash Flooding may be imminent in the Timberline and Doney Park areas. Shelter in place now.  If outdoors, seek high ground now! Do not enter drainages.
